title: URL-driven filter with connected? subscribe and stream reset
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/issues_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.IssuesLive). It must: (1) mount/3 subscribe via connected?/1 to "issues:project:#{project_id}" and initialize stream(:issues, []), (2) handle_params/3 reads %{"status" => status, "assignee" => assignee} and stream(:issues, loaded, reset: true), (3) handle_info({:issue_updated, issue}, socket) calls stream_insert, (4) a filter form uses <.link patch={~p"/issues?status=#{status}"}>. All four pieces must land.
tier_rationale: Multi-concept composite challenge. Four pieces must all land correctly.
